Machine Learning Engineer — 6 years

Model Development:
• PyTorch, TensorFlow — model training, fine-tuning, hyperparameter tuning (Optuna, Ray Tune)
• Distributed training — DDP, multi-GPU CUDA, gradient checkpointing
• MLflow — experiment tracking, model registry, artifact versioning

Optimization & Deployment:
• Model optimization — quantization (INT8, FP16), pruning, ONNX export
• Inference serving — FastAPI real-time APIs, TorchServe, Triton Inference Server
• Batch pipelines — Airflow-scheduled offline scoring pipelines

ML Operations:
• Feature store — design and maintenance (Feast, Tecton)
• Model monitoring — drift detection, data quality alerts, automated retraining triggers
• A/B testing — statistical significance testing for model variant rollouts
